name: Jasper AI
tagline: AI copywriting and content generation platform
description: Once valued at $1.5B with $120M revenue, Jasper's business collapsed to $35-55M after ChatGPT commoditized AI writing. Both co-founders departed.
story: Jasper AI was the poster child of the GPT wrapper era. Founded in 2021, the company rode the GPT-3 wave to $120 million in annual revenue and a $1.5 billion valuation by late 2022, making it one of the fastest-growing SaaS companies ever. Then ChatGPT launched. Overnight, the AI writing market went from specialized to commoditized. Why pay Jasper when ChatGPT was free? Revenue collapsed to an estimated $35-55 million by 2024 — a more than 50% decline. The company pivoted three times in twelve months: from GPT-3 wrapper, to OpenAI partnership, to attempting its own proprietary model. Both co-founders stepped down in September 2023, and the internal valuation was cut by 20%. Jasper continues operating with an enterprise marketing focus, but remains a cautionary tale of what happens when your entire product is a thin layer over someone else's API.
